tasks.a_code:
(set nums array (split $0 " "))
(set k int #1)
(set len int (len nums))
(set k int (mod k len))
(set rotated array (slice nums (- len k) len))
(push rotated (slice nums 0 (- len k)))
(println (join rotated " "))
tasks.b_code:
(set arr (split $0 " "))
(set n (len arr))
(set k (mod #1 n))
(println (join (concat (slice arr (- n k) n) (slice arr 0 (- n k))) " "))

rag_hits.desc: Take a comma-separated list of integers in arg0, sort them ascending, and print them space-separated.
Print the GCD of the two integers in arg1 (space separated).
Rotate the space-separated list in arg1 left by arg2 positions.
Sum the squares of the even integers in the space-separated list in arg1.
Sum the squares of the odd ints in the space-separated list in arg1.

tasks.a_code:
(set input string $0)
(set count int 0)
(for-each char string input
  (if (and (ge char 'A') (le char 'Z'))
    (set count (add count 1))))
(println count)
tasks.b_code:
(set s $0)
(set count int 0)
(for-each c (chars s)
  (if (is_upper c)
    (set count (+ count 1))))
(println count)
tasks.a_stderr: Runtime error: for-each requires an array or map

Print 'true' if arg1 has >=8 chars, a digit, an uppercase, and a lowercase letter, else 'false'.
Print true if arg1 has >=8 chars and contains at least one lowercase, uppercase, digit, else false.
Print true if arg1 has >=8 chars, an uppercase, a lowercase, and a digit, else false.

tasks.a_code:
(set input string $0)
(set nums array (map_arr (split input " ") (\x (str x))))
(set distinct_nums array (uniq nums))
(if (lt (len distinct_nums) 2)
    (println -1)
    (let sorted_nums (sort_by distinct_nums (\(a b) (gt a b)))
         (println (second sorted_nums))))
tasks.b_code:
(set nums (parse_ints $0))
(set u (sort (uniq nums)))
(if (lt (len u) 2)
    (println -1)
    (println (array_get u (sub (len u) 2))))

tasks.a_code:
(set arg0 string $0)
(set arg1 string $1)
(set chars array [])
(for-each ch string arg0
  (if (not (in ch arg1))
    (push chars ch)))
(println (join "" chars))
tasks.b_code:
(set s0 $0)
(set s1 $1)
(set chars1 (chars s1))
(set result [])
(for-each c (chars s0)
  (if (not (in c chars1))
    (push result c)))
(println (join "" result))

tasks.a_code:
(set num string $0)
(set digits array (split num ""))
(set product int 1)
(for-each digit string digits
  (set product (mul product (str_int digit))))
(println product)
tasks.b_code:
(set s $0)
(set p 1)
(for-each c (chars s)
  (set p (mul p (sub (string_get c 0) 48))))
(println p)

tasks.a_code:

(set n int #1)
(set len int (len input))
(if (lt len n)
  (println (fmt "{:0>{}}" n input))
  (println input))
tasks.b_code:
(set s $0)
(set n #1)
(if (lt (len s) n)
  (println (fmt "{}{}" (string_repeat "0" (- n (len s))) s))
  (else
    (println s)))

tasks.a_code:
(set sentence string $0)
(set words array (split sentence " "))
(set max_length int 0)
(for-each word string words
  (set len int (len word))
  (if (gt len max_length)
    (set max_length len)))
(println max_length)
tasks.b_code:
(set words (split $0 " "))
(set max_len 0)
(for-each w words
  (set len (len w))
  (if (gt len max_len) (set max_len len)))
(println max_len)

tasks.a_code:
(set n int #0)
(for i 1 (+ n 1)
  (cond
    ((eq (% i 15) 0) (println "FizzBuzz"))
    ((eq (% i 3) 0) (println "Fizz"))
    ((eq (% i 5) 0) (println "Buzz"))
    (true (println i))))
tasks.b_code:
(set n #0)
(for i 1 (+ n 1)
  (cond
    ((eq (mod i 15) 0) (println "FizzBuzz"))
    ((eq (mod i 3) 0) (println "Fizz"))
    ((eq (mod i 5) 0) (println "Buzz"))
    (true (println i))))

tasks.a_code:
(set input string $0)
(set shift int #1)

(fn decrypt_char c char -> char
  (set base int (ord 'A'))
  (set offset int (mod (- (ord c) base -shift) 26))
  (chr (+ base offset)))

(set decrypted string (join "" (map_arr input (\c (decrypt_char c)))))

(println decrypted)
tasks.b_code:
(set text $0)
(set shift #1)
(set result "")
(for-each c (chars text)
  (set code (string_get c 0))
  (set new_code (add 65 (mod (sub (sub code 65) shift) 26)))
  (set result (string_concat result (char_from_code new_code))))
(println result)
